items.claim: Levi Rodriguez has better striking than Felipe Franco.
items.quote: I'm just more impressed. Like his striking, I think, is a lot better.

items.claim: Levi Rodriguez has better cardio than Felipe Franco.
items.quote: I think he has better cardio. He can carry that power into the later rounds.
I think Franco's worried about his his bad cardio.

items.claim: Chase Hooper's best attribute is his ground game.
items.quote: Use your BJ black belt and and and use your your best attribute, which which is that that that ground game.

items.claim: Mitch Ramirez cannot defend takedowns effectively.
items.quote: Mitch Ramirez uh cannot stuff a takedown to save his life.

items.claim: Alvin Hines has better cardio than RJ Harris.
items.quote: Hines definitely has the better cardio.

items.claim: RJ Harris has poor striking defense.
items.quote: Harris has very questionable striking defense.

items.claim: Fatima Mccle Klein is a better striker than Tabitha Reichi.
items.quote: on the feet, you know, Fatima Klein is the much better striker.

items.claim: Alberto Montes is highly proficient at finishing fights with front chokes.
items.quote: this guy is primarily a front choke merchant. I think he has four or five front choke wins in a row.

items.claim: Tommy McMillan has poor striking defense.
items.quote: I have concerns about McMillan. I have concerns about the striking defense. It's non-existent

items.claim: Jared Cannonier has accumulated significant damage over his last five fights.
items.quote: These last five fights, he has taken a ton of damage, and that just can't be ignored.

items.claim: Jared Cannonier's chin and durability are declining.
items.quote: I'm worried about the chin, the durability. I'm worried about Jared Cananer.
